name: google-earth-gemmi-wrappers
description: Install legacy /scripts/GEMMI control-script wrappers so the OEM GoogleEarth GEM screen can call the donor GEMMI runtime already deployed under /mnt/nav/gemmi/.
author: dspl1236
notes: Installs legacy /scripts/GEMMI/*.sh names expected by GoogleEarth.esd
Does NOT modify lsd.jxe or firmware
Tested on a US RNS-850 (HN+_US_VW_P0738) after donor GEMMI deployment.
uninstall: Use build_sd.py --uninstall to remove /mnt/efs-system/scripts/GEMMI/, or delete that script directory manually.
